images.caption: Figure 1:(a)An oracle-conditioned teacher biases the student toward a single root; reversing the signal preserves deliberation and recovers the rest.(b)Qwen3-8B on HMMT 2025: AntiSD reaches GRPO’s peak in∼\sim1/51/5the steps and ends+15+15pp higher; default self-distillation underperforms GRPO.

Figure 2:Per-token signalut=tt−stu_{t}=t_{t}-s_{t}on Qwen3-4B-IT-2507 at AIME-25.(a)Single-rollout trace.(b)(πS,πT)(\pi_{S},\pi_{T})heatmap. Blue marks deliberation tokens (ut≪0u_{t}\ll 0); red marks shortcut tokens (ut≫0u_{t}\gg 0).
Figure 3:HMMT25 pass@kkat each row’s peak-mean snapshot. AntiSD’s lead over GRPO is sustained acrosskk– the gain reflects expanded coverage, not just variance reduction.
Figure 4:Training dynamicson three models (rows) along six axes (columns). Faded traces are raw values; bold traces are2020-step rolling means.
Figure 5:Mechanism ablations: failure modes.Top: reward over non-truncated rollouts. Bottom: mean response length. Line truncation indicates run termination after collapse.
